vocab.meaning: để lại một di sản/truyền thống về (thường là thói quen từ nhỏ)
vocab.example: My parents used to bequeath a legacy of reading every night, which turned me into a complete bookworm as a child.

vocab.meaning: khám phá thông qua vận động cơ thể
vocab.example: I spent most of my weekends in kinesthetic exploration, climbing trees and navigating the rocky terrain behind our house.

vocab.meaning: tâm trí dễ uốn nắn/đang trong giai đoạn phát triển mạnh
vocab.example: At that age, I had a very malleable mind, so learning to play the piano felt like second nature to me.

vocab.meaning: tình bạn thân thiết được hình thành từ nhóm bạn cùng lứa
vocab.example: The local football matches we organized were less about the score and more about the peer-induced camaraderie we felt.

vocab.meaning: môi trường giàu trải nghiệm giác quan
vocab.example: Spending summers on my grandfather's farm provided a sensory-rich environment that taught me about biology firsthand.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác phấn khích gián tiếp (thông qua phim ảnh, sách báo)
vocab.example: I used to get a vicarious thrill from watching adventure documentaries, which later influenced my love for traveling.

vocab.meaning: sự thành thạo trong việc vận hành/điều khiển (đồ chơi, máy móc)
vocab.example: I was obsessed with radio-controlled cars, striving for operational mastery as I navigated them through complex obstacles.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về mặt trí tuệ
vocab.example: My grandfather always encouraged my intellectual curiosity by gifting me encyclopedias about the solar system.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy sự an ủi trong tâm hồn
vocab.example: I would often derive spiritual solace from sketching in the garden, a quiet activity that helped me stay grounded.
Model building required prolonged concentration, which I believe helped me develop a great deal of patience as an adult.
